other_observers: Bill Maynard, Kara L, Mark Peterson Many Observers; Found by BG but seen at that time by Bill Maynard
specific_location: Holmes grove and Eagle Grove Chico Basin Ranch
description: A small Dendroica warbler olive above and yellow below. On the mantle the bird had rusty streaking. On the sides the bird had black streaking. Intricate black and yellow face pattern.Behaviors: Typically foraged high in Cottonwoods and elmsCall: Call a sharp chip "tuk", song a rising buzzy thin Zee zee zee zee zePlumage: adult
